title: Supervise the monitoring of biodiversity
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise the monitoring of biodiversity demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for monitoring biodiversity

pcs.text: Determine aims and goals of monitoring plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine aims and goals of monitoring plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine aims and goals of monitoring plan.
